name: Sleep Draught
lore: A gentle indigo brew that quiets a restless mind.

name: Energy Elixir
lore: A bright fizzing tonic that lifts heavy limbs.

name: Calming Tonic
lore: Smells of evening grass. Steadies a fluttering heart.

name: Healing Balm
lore: A thick green balm that knits skin and silences pain.
